title: One Lovely Name by Walter Savage Landor
content:
One lovely name adorns my song,
And, dwelling in the heart,
Forever falters at the tongue,
And trembles to depart.
meaning: "One Lovely Name" by Walter Savage Landor is a love english poem consisting of 4 lines. This English poem by Walter Savage Landor demonstrates the timeless power of verse to capture complex human emotions. Beginning with "One lovely name adorns my song, And, dwelling in the heart,...", this piece explores themes of love through vivid imagery and emotional resonance. The work invites contemplation on the deeper currents of life, love, and the human condition. Walter Savage Landor's celebrated body of poetry continues to inspire readers across generations and cultures, and this particular work stands as a powerful example of their artistic vision.
